'''鈭歸-z-n''' ('''kawazan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knick|knick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-z-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knick|knick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-z-n
|-
! Lemma
| kawazan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwazan|thiwazan]] || [[word:jiwazan|jiwazan]] || [[word:shiwazan|shiwazan]] || [[word:kiwazan|kiwazan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwazan|thuthuwazan]] || [[word:jujuwazan|jujuwazan]] || [[word:shushuwazan|shushuwazan]] || [[word:kukuwazan|kukuwazan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwazan|thuwazan]] || [[word:juwazan|juwazan]] || [[word:shuwazan|shuwazan]] || [[word:kuwazan|kuwazan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwazan|thuwazan]] || [[word:juwazan|juwazan]] || [[word:shuwazan|shuwazan]] || [[word:kuwazan|kuwazan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewazan|thewazan]] || [[word:jewazan|jewazan]] || [[word:shewazan|shewazan]] || [[word:kewazan|kewazan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowazan|thothowazan]] || [[word:jojowazan|jojowazan]] || [[word:shoshowazan|shoshowazan]] || [[word:kokowazan|kokowazan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowazan|thowazan]] || [[word:jowazan|jowazan]] || [[word:showazan|showazan]] || [[word:kowazan|kowazan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowazan|thowazan]] || [[word:jowazan|jowazan]] || [[word:showazan|showazan]] || [[word:kowazan|kowazan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wazan|th忙wazan]] || [[word:j忙wazan|j忙wazan]] || [[word:sh忙wazan|sh忙wazan]] || [[word:k忙wazan|k忙wazan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawazan|thathawazan]] || [[word:jajawazan|jajawazan]] || [[word:shashawazan|shashawazan]] || [[word:kakawazan|kakawazan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawazan|thawazan]] || [[word:jawazan|jawazan]] || [[word:shawazan|shawazan]] || [[word:kawazan|kawazan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawazan|thawazan]] || [[word:jawazan|jawazan]] || [[word:shawazan|shawazan]] || [[word:kawazan|kawazan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawazan|shawazan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawazan|goshawazan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawazan|gokishawazan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawazan眉|shawazan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawazankn眉|goshawazankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazan眉|gokishawazan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawazansh毛|shawazansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawazanksh毛|goshawazanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawazansh毛|gokishawazansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazanro|shawazanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazankro|goshawazankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazanro|gokishawazanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazanmu|shawazanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazankmu|goshawazankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazanmu|gokishawazanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawazansher|shawazansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawazanksher|goshawazanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawazansher|gokishawazansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawazang|shawazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawazankng|goshawazankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawazang|gokishawazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawazanya|shawazanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawazankya|goshawazankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawazanya|gokishawazanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawazanyam|shawazanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawazankyam|goshawazankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawazanyam|gokishawazanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazan眉sh毛|shawazan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazankn眉sh毛|goshawazankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazan眉sh毛|gokishawazan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazan眉ro|shawazan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazankn眉ro|goshawazankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazan眉ro|gokishawazan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazan眉mu|shawazan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazankn眉mu|goshawazankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazan眉mu|gokishawazan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazansh毛n眉|shawazansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazanksh毛n眉|goshawazanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazansh毛n眉|gokishawazansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazansh毛ro|shawazansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazanksh毛ro|goshawazanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazansh毛ro|gokishawazansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazansh毛mu|shawazansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazanksh毛mu|goshawazanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazansh毛mu|gokishawazansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazanron眉|shawazanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazankron眉|goshawazankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazanron眉|gokishawazanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazanrosh毛|shawazanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazankrosh毛|goshawazankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazanrosh毛|gokishawazanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazanromu|shawazanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazankromu|goshawazankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazanromu|gokishawazanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazanmun眉|shawazanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazankmun眉|goshawazankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazanmun眉|gokishawazanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazanmush毛|shawazanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazankmush毛|goshawazankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazanmush毛|gokishawazanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazanmuro|shawazanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazankmuro|goshawazankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazanmuro|gokishawazanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
